title: bursera denticulata
intro: Bursera denticulata, also known as palo fierro, is a plant species native to Central America, particularly in Mexico and Costa Rica. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bursera denticulata include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. Bursera denticulata can be prepared as herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
